narrative:
01 congressional district has 565,219 registered voters, with 58.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.3%, a modest Republican lean of 4.7 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +1.4% D−R vs -13.3% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
